lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee dar saachai pat paaee he |16|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Name, one is blessed with glorious greatness, and obtains honor in the Court of the True Lord. ||16||3||
He does whatever He pleases.
No one has done, or can do anything by himself.
In the love of duality, they are caught by the noose of the Messenger of Death.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਆਇਆ ਸੋ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo aaeaa so sabh ko jaasee |
lines.english: All who come shall have to depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur raakhe se jan ubare saache saach samaaee he |1|
lines.english: Those humble beings who are protected by the True Guru, are saved. They merge into the Truest of the True. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਲੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare soee jan lekhai |
lines.english: Thay alone are acceptable, upon whom He bestows His Glance of Grace.
The Creator Himself creates the creation, and watches over it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੂਝੈ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaan tis sabh kichh soojhai agiaanee andh kamaaee he |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukh attains spiritual wisdom, and understands everything. The ignorant ones act blindly. ||2||
The self-willed manmukh is cynical; he doesn't understand.
He dies and dies again, only to be reborn, and loses his life uselessly again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam rate sukh paaeaa sahaje saach samaaee he |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord; he find peace, and is intuitively immersed in the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: fir hovai kanchan bhettai gur pooraa |
lines.english: But meeting with the Perfect Guru, it is transmuted into gold once again.
Chasing after worldly affairs, the mind has become corroded and rusty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape bakhas le sukh paae poorai sabad milaaee he |4|
lines.english: When the Lord Himself grants forgiveness, then peace is obtained; through the Perfect Word of the Shabad, one is united with Him. ||4||
They are the most unworthy of the unworthy.
The false and evil-minded are the most wicked of the wicked.
The unworthy soul-bride is not pleasing to her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਚੀ ਮਤਿ ਫੀਕਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲੈ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kachee mat feekaa mukh bolai duramat naam na paaee he |5|
lines.english: With false intellect, and insipid words of mouth, evil-minded, they do not obtain the Naam. ||5||
False-minded, her actions are false.
The evil-minded, wicked soul-bride practices wickedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕਾ ਸਾਉ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਮੂਰਖਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: pir kaa saau na jaanai moorakh bin gur boojh na paaee he |6|
lines.english: The foolish person does not know the excellence of her Husband Lord. Without the Guru, she does not understand at all. ||6||
God Himself issues the Hukam of His Command, and beholds all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਸਦਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gunavantee sadaa pir raavai satigur mel milaaee he |7|
lines.english: The virtuous soul-bride enjoys and ravishes her Husband Lord forever; the True Guru unites her in His Union. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਪਿਰ ਖਸਮ ਨ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: seegaar kare pir khasam na bhaavai |
lines.english: She decorates herself, but her Husband Lord is not pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: anadin naam rate sach paaeaa aape mel milaaee he |8|
lines.english: Night and day, they are imbued with the Naam, and they find the True Lord. He Himself unites them in His Union. ||8||
Some are forgiven, according to their pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲੈ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aape melai aape kar vekhai bin satigur boojh na paaee he |9|
lines.english: He Himself unites, He Himself acts, and beholds. Without the True Guru, understanding is not obtained. ||9||
Egotism attaches them to the juice of emotional attachment, and makes them run around.
The Gurmukh is intuitively immersed in the True Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਜਨ ਜਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik sabad veechaar sadaa jan jaage |
lines.english: Some contemplate the Word of the Shabad; these humble beings remain always awake and aware.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਸੋਇ ਰਹੇ ਅਭਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik maaeaa mohi soe rahe abhaage |
lines.english: Some are attached to the love of Maya; these unfortunate ones remain asleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਹੋਰੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae aape hor karanaa kichhoo na jaaee he |10|
lines.english: He Himself acts, and inspires all to act; no one else can do anything. ||10||
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, death is conquered and killed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖੈ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam rakhai ur dhaare |
lines.english: Keep the Name of the Lord enshrined within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: satigur sevaa te sukh paaeaa har kai naam samaaee he |11|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, peace is obtained, and one merges in the Name of the Lord. ||11||
In the love of duality, the world wanders around insane.
Immersed in love and attachment to Maya, it suffers in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੇ ਭੇਖ ਕਰੈ ਨਹ ਪਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: bahute bhekh karai neh paae bin satigur sukh na paaee he |12|
lines.english: Wearing all sorts of religious robes, He is not obtained. Without the True Guru, peace is not found. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: aape miharavaan sukhadaataa jiau bhaavai tivai chalaaee he |13|
lines.english: He Himself is the Merciful Giver of peace; as He wills, so do we follow. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਹੀਐ ਜਾ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kis no kaheeai jaa aap karaae |
lines.english: Who is to blame, when He Himself does everything?
As He wills, so is the path we take.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ਮਧੁਸੂਦਨੁ ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਮੇਟਿਆ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aape niramal miharavaan madhusoodan jis daa hukam na mettiaa jaaee he |14|
lines.english: He Himself is immaculate, compassionate, the lover of nectar; the Hukam of His Command cannot be erased. ||14||
He Himself is detached, and He Himself is attached.
He Himself is the Creator, and He Himself is the Enjoyer.
Those who know the One Lord are very fortunate.
